message:
feat(demo): add VirtualizedSearch screen with fuzzy filtering

Introduce VirtualizedSearch demo screen showcasing the Virtualized
widget with real-time fuzzy search filtering over a large item set.

New screen registration in app.rs:
- Add ScreenId::VirtualizedSearch variant (index 21)
- Register short_name() "VirtSearch" and config_name() "VirtualizedSearch"
- Wire up update(), tick(), view(), and keybindings() dispatching
- Expand screen_errors array to [Option<String>; 22]

Chrome integration in chrome.rs:
- Map VirtualizedSearch to theme::screen_accent::PERFORMANCE
  (consistent with other performance-focused demos)

File browser enhancements in file_browser.rs:
- Add unicode-width dependency for proper width calculations
- Store entries field for entry management
- Add set_entries() method for dynamic entry updates
- Add visible_entries() helper method for filtered views

Cargo.toml dependency:
- Add unicode-width = "0.2.2" for grapheme width support

The VirtualizedSearch screen demonstrates:
- Large list handling with efficient virtualization
- Real-time fuzzy search with substring matching
- Keyboard navigation through filtered results
- Integration with the Fenwick tree height tracking

Part of bd-2zbk (Virtualized List system) and supports bd-3vbf.17
(Widget Gallery comprehensive showcase).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
